title: 30 Pcs Christmas Foliage Real Touch Norfolk Pine Stems Branches, 15Inch Needle Branch Tree Picks Faux Evergreen Sprigs Fake Greenery for Xmas Garland Wreath DIY Crafts Home Decor
features: Premium Quality: Set of 30 artificial christmas norfolk pine branches crafted from high-quality soft PE materials for a lifelike appearance, perfect filler branches for your christmas home decorations.

Versatile: These 38cm artificial christmas foliage greenery pine stems are perfect as christmas wreath making supplies for xmas wreath DIY crafting, norfolk pine tree making, christmas norfolk pine wreath making , norfolk pine garlands decorations, centrepieces, and other festive decor.

Convenient: artificial norfolk pine tree branches,no maintenance required, ensuring long-lasting beauty without the hassle of real pine needles. It's the perfect finishing touch for your christmas home decor.
Detailed Design: Our fake norfolk christmas tree filler branches are intricately designed with a natural pine texture and vibrant green hues for an authentic look for your christmas decorations

Multipurpose: These artificial christmas foliage sprigs are suitable for various DIY crafts, norfolk wreath garland making supplies, swags,vase filling, dinning table centerpiece decor, christmas home decorations, and holiday projects.
